title: Horrifying Creatures
description: Minecraft is now haunted by Horrifying Creatures
body:
# Horrifying Creatures
Minecraft is now haunted by Horrifying Creatures.

This modpack adds 3 mods which aim to make your Minecraft experience, into a horror game.
- **Cave Dweller Evolved**: Cave noises are more than just sound effects
- **Mutant Monsters**: Horrifying amalgamations now roam the world
- **The Man From The Fog**: There's something following you in the night

This modpack, although simple, is terrifying.
